diff --git a/src/services/DataProcessor.js b/src/services/DataProcessor.js
index abc123..def456 100644
--- a/src/services/DataProcessor.js
+++ b/src/services/DataProcessor.js
@@ -1,10 +1,210 @@
 // DataProcessor — bulk data transformation service
+import _ from 'lodash'
+
+export class DataProcessor {
+  processRecord_1(data) { return data.map(x => x * 1) }
+  processRecord_2(data) { return data.map(x => x * 2) }
+  processRecord_3(data) { return data.map(x => x * 3) }
+  processRecord_4(data) { return data.map(x => x * 4) }
